cards.back: The field of study that enables machines to interpret and understand visual data from images and videos

cards.front: When was computer vision first introduced?
cards.back: The 1950s and 1960s with the work of pioneers like Alan Turing and Marvin Minsky
An image that represents the amount of light or intensity of each pixel

cards.front: What is the primary goal of computer vision?
cards.back: To enable machines to interpret and understand visual data from images and videos

cards.front: What type of image is formed when light passes through a lens or mirror?
cards.back: A real image or virtual image, depending on the optics used
